name: memory-visualization-dashboard-local-edb-clawbot
purpose: Local clawbot configuration for updating EDB Excel inputs and opening pull requests for the storage dashboard.
allowed_tasks: Update EDB Excel files under edb_data/
Open a pull request with source files only
edb_file_rules: Only update the four fixed Excel files in edb_data/.
Do not rename files, worksheets, date columns, price columns, or indicator names.
Append new rows or replace the latest source workbook when the upstream EDB export changes.
Do not rewrite historical rows unless correcting a verified source error.
If correcting history, explain date range, reason, and source in the pull request body.
Zero, 0.0, blank, and negative prices are treated as unavailable data and should not be forced into charts.
Source displayed by the dashboard for EDB prices is WIND unless a future authorized web source is configured.

review_notes_required: Latest date covered by each Excel file
Whether any historical rows were corrected

deployment_behavior: After PR merge to main, GitHub Actions runs import reports, updateData, build, and deploy.
The website is static; browser refresh does not fetch unmerged PR content.
The page updates only after GitHub Actions completes and GitHub Pages deploys.
